nodes.title: Create an output samplesheet that can be used as input in nf-core/proteinfold
Update the update_families subworkflow to also output the FASTA files of families
Make re-alignment after sequence redundancy removal skippable
Report rare cases of discarded families where hmmsearch does not recruit any sequence
Recalculate sequence slice coordinates after gap clipping
Non redundant family alignments are not published properly, if intra-family redundancy removal mechanism is switched off
CHUNK_CLUSTERS throws an error, if no clusters pass the minimum membership filter threshold
Extra QC module to discard very small or very large families (in length)
nf-tests for local modules and subworkflows
The FILTER_RECRUITED module must not produce an empty file output if no sequences remain to be written, because it makes HMMER_HMMALIGN crash
align output syntax and publish dir dirs
Update nf-core modules and subworkflows to latest
Important! Template update for nf-core/tools v3.5.1
Resource optimization (memory and time) for test and test_full profiles.
Important! Template update for nf-core/tools v3.4.1
Misc updates - nf-core QC subworkflow, preprint, metromaps, new output module
extract_family_reps -appending all sequences in one- bug fixed
New check quality subworkflow - added seqkit/stats and custom script that generates MultiQC report
Pulling params from subworkflows into main workflow
Important! Template update for nf-core/tools v3.3.2
